title: Top 3 Products per Category by Units Sold

landmines.name: ranking-ties-extra-rows
landmines.kills: RANK() (or 'count how many sold more') gives tied products the same rank, so a tie at the cutoff returns more than three rows. ROW_NUMBER with an explicit product_id tie-break returns exactly three. Kills naive/1_rank_ties_extra_rows.sql and naive/2_correlated_count_greater.sql.

landmines.name: correlated-subquery-tle
landmines.kills: Ranking each product by a correlated COUNT of products that sold more is O(n^2) over the per-product aggregate and times out at Purple scale, while the windowed reference is linear. TLE for naive/2_correlated_count_greater.sql.

landmines.name: never-sold-products
landmines.kills: Products with no order_items must be absent. LEFT-joining products to sales and ranking would surface never-sold products with zero units.

notes: naive/2_correlated_count_greater.sql is the designated TLE-slow solution: correct-shaped but quadratic. Deterministic tie-break (units_sold DESC, product_id ASC) makes the top three objectively reproducible. Window functions require MySQL 8+.
